title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Kaido, Big Mom as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
